title: NPV: What is the main technique used to assess the potential...
summary: Assess merger value creation using NPV analysis comparing synergies to acquisition costs.
prompt: What is the main technique used to assess the potential value of a merger?

options.text: NPV analysis is the primary technique used to assess the potential value of a
Payback ignores time value of money

solution: NPV analysis is the primary technique used to assess the potential value of a merger, by comparing the expected cash inflows from the merger against the costs associated with it.
